title: Before the Queen Elizabeth II Cup

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today is the Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At 2,200 meters long, it's a similar distance to
the Japanese Oaks, which was rough on Nishino
Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: Do you think you can do this, Flower?
Do you think you can do this, Flower?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You believe I can do this too, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I am scared, but if you believe in me... then I'll be okay.
